Summary: Scaffold: provider switch keeps previous model
Steps to Reproduce: 1. scaffold workflow --pattern fan-out-fan-in 2. Pick gemini + custom model 3. Switch to ollama + Enter for model
Actual: Model stays as gemini/gemini-2.5-flash producing llm://ollama/gemini/gemini-2.5-flash
Fix Description: Reset default_model when provider changes in _interactive_node_config

Summary: Scaffold: double provider prefix in agent URI
Steps to Reproduce: 1. scaffold workflow 2. Pick gemini 3. Accept default model gemini/gemini-2.0-flash
Fix Description: Strip litellm provider prefix from model when agent_prefix already contains it
